info.description: A modern Restaurant API built with Go, Gin, and GORM
info.title: Geritcht Restaurant API

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all allergens.

post.description: Create a new allergen. Admin access required.

delete.description: Delete an allergen by its ID. Admin access required.

409.description: Allergen cannot be deleted because it is in use

patch.description: Update an existing allergen. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data or allergen ID

post.description: Change user password

400.description: Invalid request data or current password is incorrect

post.description: Send a password reset code to the user's registered email address.
Authenticate user with email and password
Invalidate refresh token and logout user
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new user account with email,firstname, lastname and password

400.description: Invalid request data or user already exists

post.description: Reset user password with reset token

400.description: Invalid request data or token expired

post.description: Verify a user's email address using the verification token or OTP.
Verify that a password reset token or OTP is valid before allowing the user to reset their password.

400.description: Invalid or expired password reset token

get.description: Check available tables for a specified date, time, and party size.

400.description: Invalid request data or time slot

get.description: Retrieve current user's shopping cart with all items

post.description: Add a menu item to the current user's shopping cart

parameters.description: Menu item and quantity to add
parameters.name: input

delete.description: Remove all items from the current user's shopping cart

put.description: Update the quantity of a specific item in the current user's shopping cart

404.description: Cart item not found or menu item not found

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the current user's shopping cart

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all product categories

post.description: Create a new product category with a name, description, and image: admin only

400.description: Invalid request data or image upload failed

get.description: Search for categories by name or description

404.description: No categories found matching the search criteria

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific product category by its ID

put.description: Update an existing product category's name, description, and/or image admin only

400.description: Invalid request data or image upload failed

delete.description: Remove a product category by its ID. Admin only

get.description: Retrieve a list of all ingredients with pagination.Admin access required.

post.description: Create a new ingredient. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve a list of ingredients with stock below their threshold Admin access required.
Search ingredients by name with pagination
Retrieve an ingredient by its ID Admin access required.

delete.description: Delete an ingredient by ID. Admin access required.

patch.description: Update an existing ingredient by ID. Admin access required.

post.description: Check whether an ingredient has fallen below its configured stock threshold and notify the authenticated user if necessary

put.description: Set the threshold limit for an ingredient. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve menu items with optional filtering by category, dietary tags, and ingredients, along with pagination. Admin access required.
get.summary: Get all menu items with filtering and pagination

post.description: Create a new menu item. The referenced category, dietary tags, and ingredients must already exist. Admin access required.

get.description: Search menu items by name, category, dietary tags, or ingredients with pagination.
Retrieve an existing menu item by ID. Admin access required.

delete.description: Delete an existing menu item by ID. Admin access required.

patch.description: Update an existing menu item by ID. The referenced category, dietary tags, and ingredients must already exist. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data or menu ID

post.description: Upload an image for an existing menu item. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid menu ID, missing image, or upload failed

delete.description: Delete the image associated with a menu item. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid menu ID or delete failed

patch.description: Toggle the availability status of a menu item. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid menu ID or missing is_available field

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all orders placed by the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new takeout order from the authenticated user's cart.

400.description: Invalid request data, cart is empty, or menu item unavailable

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all takeout orders placed by the authenticated user.
Retrieve the details of a specific takeout order placed by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Cancel a takeout order placed by the authenticated user if it's eligible for cancellation.

400.description: Invalid order ID or order cannot be cancelled

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all payments made by the authenticated user.

post.description: Initialize a payment for an existing order and return the payment authorization details.

400.description: Invalid request data, invalid order status, or order already paid

get.description: Retrieve the details of a payment using its unique payment reference.

post.description: Verify the status of a payment using its transaction reference.

400.description: Invalid request data or payment not found
Invalid signature or payment not found

get.description: Retrieve the details of a payment using its unique ID.
Retrieve all ingredients linked to a menu item's recipe.

post.description: Link an ingredient to a menu item's recipe with the specified quantity. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data, ingredient ID, or quantity

409.description: Ingredient already linked to this recipe

delete.description: Remove an ingredient from a menu item's recipe. Admin access required.

patch.description: Update the quantity or details of an ingredient linked to a menu item's recipe. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a refund using its unique ID.
Retrieve all reservations belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new table reservation for the authenticated user.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

400.description: Invalid request data, invalid time slot, table unavailable, or invalid table capacity

get.description: Retrieve all reservations. Admin access required.
Retrieve all reservations for today. Admin access required.
Retrieve a reservation by its ID for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Cancel an existing reservation owned by the authenticated user.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

post.description: Check in the authenticated user for an existing reservation.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

400.description: Cannot check in or reservation already checked in

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all staff members. Admin access required.
Retrieve the authenticated staff member's profile.

patch.description: Update the authenticated staff member's profile information.
Activate a staff account. Admin access required.
Deactivate a staff account. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all restaurant tables.

post.description: Create a new restaurant table. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data or invalid table capacity

get.description: Retrieve a restaurant table by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a restaurant table by its ID. Admin access required.

patch.description: Update an existing restaurant table. Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data or table ID

patch.description: Update the status of a restaurant table (e.g. Available, Reserved, Occupied). Admin access required.

400.description: Invalid request data or table ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all dietary tags with pagination.

post.description: Create a new dietary tag. Admin access required.

delete.description: Delete a dietary tag by ID. Admin access required.

409.description: Cannot delete dietary tag with associated meals

patch.description: Update an existing dietary tag by ID. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all registered users. Admin access required.
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information.
Activate a user account. Admin access required.
Deactivate a user account. Admin access required.

get.description: Search users using supported filter parameters. Admin access required.

post.description: Join the reservation waitlist for a preferred date, time slot, and party size when no suitable table is available.

400.description: Invalid request data, invalid date/time, table available, invalid table capacity, or user already on the waitlist

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's current position on the waitlist for a specific date and time slot.

400.description: Invalid request or user is not on the waitlist

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
